subcodes.first_line: This is the Book that speaketh with truth in the world and calleth the peoples unto God, the Lord of all worlds. Say: We have sent forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق فی العالم و یدع الامم الی الله رب العالمین قل انا ارسلنا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @apocalyptic imagery, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
